frontend_engineer.label: Frontend Engineer
frontend_engineer.description: Builds user interfaces using modern web technologies

backend_engineer.label: Backend Engineer
backend_engineer.description: Builds server-side APIs, services, and data pipelines

fullstack_engineer.label: Fullstack Engineer
fullstack_engineer.description: Builds both frontend and backend components end-to-end

devops_engineer.label: DevOps / Platform Engineer
devops_engineer.description: Manages infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud deployments

data_scientist.label: Data Scientist
data_scientist.description: Analyses data and builds statistical / ML models for insights

ml_engineer.label: ML / AI Engineer
ml_engineer.description: Designs, trains, and deploys machine-learning models at scale

android_developer.label: Android Developer
android_developer.description: Builds native Android applications using Kotlin / Java

ios_developer.label: iOS Developer
ios_developer.description: Builds native iOS / macOS applications using Swift

cloud_engineer.label: Cloud Engineer
cloud_engineer.description: Architects and manages cloud infrastructure across providers

qa_engineer.label: QA / Test Engineer
qa_engineer.description: Ensures software quality through automated and manual testing

cybersecurity_engineer.label: Cybersecurity Engineer
cybersecurity_engineer.description: Protects systems and data through security engineering and analysis

blockchain_developer.label: Blockchain Developer
blockchain_developer.description: Builds decentralised applications and smart contracts
